assertion_results.text: Tasks target both trustify-backend and trustify-ui repositories
Backend tasks are ordered before dependent frontend tasks
Frontend tasks reference Figma context for UI components
Each non-documentation task file contains all required template sections
Task count is between 3 and 15 inclusive
Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the respective repo structure
Impact map lists concrete, specific changes
Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name
Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections
For each task created, a description digest is produced with format-tagged SHA-256 hash
Priority is inherited (Critical) when set on Feature
fixVersions are inherited when set on Feature
